race.comment: Competitive. VIXEN'S MOON (2) has been racing in better class and her numbers stack right up. Has been kept up to the mark with a Devonport trial and keeps Bingley's 2kg claim. Fourth up now and gets her chance at this level. THE PIRATE QUEEN (6) was on the speed from the rails draw last start and fought on well beaten a whisker this track/trip. Was even better prior, narrowly beaten in a CL2 at Hobart. Draws to advantage again and should be right in the finish. ACCUSAIENT (3) is racing well. Delivered her Maiden and then got back and finished hard here over 1200m beaten 1.6L. Maps better and the leading hoop goes on. Peaks and has to be considered. WHO'S IN DEV (4) was heavily bet leading and winning her Maiden here this trip. Fitter again and she will ride the speed and give a sight.
